summary: PowerShell scripts are excellent (strict mode, proper validation, error handling). Workflow has critical security and structural issues: (1) actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to commit SHA (supply chain risk); (2) Duplicated logic in markdown/JSON validator steps (lines 42–68), identical env/params with only format difference; (3) Workflow references nonexistent tests/, secrets.json, and .as-of files—cannot run via act without fixtures; (4) No explicit error checking on step exit codes; (5) Lacks input validation that required files exist. Add actionlint pin-to-SHA enforcement, refactor duplicate validator steps into a loop/composite action, provide fixture files or skip tests if missing.
